subject: Physical Education
chapter: Physical Education and Sports for CWSN

formulas.name: Definition of Sports for CWSN
formulas.formula: Sports and games for CWSN are specially designed games and sports that can be played by children with special needs.
formulas.notes: This is a basic definition of sports for children with special needs.

formulas.name: Law of Accessibility
formulas.formula: All sports and games for CWSN should be accessible and inclusive.
formulas.notes: This law ensures that children with special needs have equal opportunities to participate in sports and games.

formulas.name: Principle of Adaptation
formulas.formula: Sports and games for CWSN should be adapted to suit the needs and abilities of children with special needs.
formulas.notes: This principle ensures that children with special needs are able to participate in sports and games safely and enjoyably.

formulas.name: Definition of CWSN
formulas.formula: Children with Special Needs (CWSN) are children who have physical, mental, or emotional disabilities that require special care and support.
formulas.notes: This definition highlights the importance of providing special support and care to children with special needs.

formulas.name: Importance of Inclusion
formulas.formula: Inclusion is crucial in sports and games for CWSN as it promotes equality, respect, and understanding.
formulas.notes: This emphasizes the importance of creating an inclusive environment for children with special needs to participate in sports and games.
